issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: CharacterBody2D platformer with coyote time
scenarios.rationale: Baseline covers Godot 4 basics but commonly omits proper coyote-time wiring or slips into Godot 3 names; treatment uses @export/@onready, Timer-based coyote logic, Input.get_axis, and move_and_slide as documented.

scenarios.name: Decoupled coin -> manager via signals + groups
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses signals but often skips groups for discovery; treatment declares typed signal collected(value: int), emits on body_entered filtered by is_in_group("player"), and connects via get_nodes_in_group("coins") as the skill prescribes.
